name: costorm-session
description: Interactive, human-in-the-loop Co-STORM research: a steerable, turn-based discourse among LLM experts and a moderator over web sources, growing a shared mind map, then synthesizing a cited report. Resumable.

interface.longDescription: Run an interactive research roundtable that grows a durable mind map and synthesizes a cited report when the user is ready.
defaultPrompt: Start a steerable Co-STORM research session on this topic.
